insight: For Jay Baek.dev, pages should consume content through src/lib/content/graph.ts only; collection reads, sorting, tag indexes, series indexes, and related content stay inside the Content Graph Module.

Mermaid is client-side by default but pay-as-used: detect diagram pages, hide raw syntax before first paint, keep no-JS/failure fallback readable, and keep animation inside the Content Rendering Module.
Jay Baek.dev visual direction should be an editorial engineering workbench: typography-led, calm, technical, no generic SaaS card grids or purple AI gradients.
